title: Noita's Tool Tinkers
description: A simple resource pack that tweaks tool sprites to add more flair and reflect their original material's textures!
body:
## Noita's Tool Tinkers: Tools that reflect their Materials!

It's what it says on the tin. This resource pack changes most tool and weapon sprites to somewhat reflect their original material's textures and coloring, along with adding a little extra flair to each of them to make them feel unique!

**FYI: The pack also changes Stone Hoe's sprite, and Wooden and Stone Spears' GUI sprites, for consistency.**

<details>
<summary>Gallery (press to expand)</summary>

![Copper Weapons and Tools displayed on Glow Item Frames, encased inside a Copper box.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/254c743485aa8fcc89f8abe4213a6d4333b8adcd.png)
![Iron Weapons and Tools displayed on Item Frames, inside of an Iron-filled cave.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12214ac1fb424c4d5906589748b95de5895d4b8b_0.webp)
![Golden Weapons and Tools, displayed on Glow Item Frames, inside of a very greedy desertperson's tomb.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15936b3ecc6c5b29d994f5921a7a59cfcd9ed5d9_0.webp)
![Diamond Weapons and Tools, displayed on Glow Item Frames, while outside. A Beacon beam with a repeating pattern of colors can be seen behind the display, and a Cherry house with some banners can be seen to the right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12fcccf7b158bf7def1938d5c356d4a011a7c1d3.png)
![Netherite Weapons and Tools, displayed on Glow Item Frames, inside of a seemingly modified Bastion Remnant room with Ancient Debris.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b2442d6aa585ab59bb8ddbd15931f5288278577.png)

</details>
